Hotel Name: Royal Monte-Carlo Sharm Resort & SPA
Description:
Offering an outdoor pool and a spa and wellness center, Royal Monte-Carlo Sharm Resort & SPA Suites is located in Sharm El Sheikh. The property offers private beach. At The Royal Beach guests will enjoy complimentary drinks served by the dedicated Royal Butler Service and beach Cabanas. All rooms and suites come with views of the Red Sea.

Royal Monte-Carlo Sharm Resort & SPA Suites, drinks will be served in wide selection of 4 bars and Lobby Lounge area and a tennis court. Other facilities offered at the property include entertainment staff, meeting facilities and a ticket service. An array of activities can be enjoyed on site or in the surroundings, including diving and snorkeling.

Guests with an all inclusive package can enjoy free private transfers to and from the airport, early check-in at 8:00, late check out at 17:00, and a bottle of wine upon check-in. Other benefits include access to a private beach and the VIP Royal Lounge, a butler on the beach, a free mini bar including soft and alcoholic drinks, free shisha, Wifi, and access to the sauna, Jacuzzi and steam room. All inclusive guests can also enjoy free unlimited access to 7 a la carte restaurants including Italian, seafood, Indian, Lebanese and Asian, among others.

If you feel like visiting the surroundings, check out Naama Bay (2.2 mi) and Ras Mohammed National Park (7.7 mi). Hotel Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Sharm El Sheikh Sharm Bay
Description:
Surrounded by palm trees, just 5.6 mi from Sharm El Sheikh Airport, DoubleTree by Hilton Sharks Bay Resort features private beach, family entertainment and a range of leisure activities and water sports.

All rooms are feature a private balcony. It includes a flat-screen TV and a fridge. The bathroom is fitted with a bath and a bathrobe.

DoubleTree by Hilton Sharks Bay Resort features 7 outdoor pools, with plenty of space to relax around the terrace. Guests can keep up with their fitness routines using the high-tech gym facilities, followed by a massage with views of the Red Sea.

The Red Sea coast can be explored with the guidance of the onsite professional diving center. Children will be kept entertained at the kid’s club, their shaded pool area and entertainment from the animation team.

The resort offers a variety of cuisines from 13 restaurant and bars. Hotel Name: Continental Plaza Beach Resort
Description:
This 4-star resort in Sharm el-Sheikh is located in El Pasha Bay (Garden Reef Bay), adjacent to Naama Bay. It has 2 restaurants, an aqua park and an extensive spa. Guests will have free access to the Aqua Park.

The bright rooms at the Independent SPHC Continental Plaza Beach Resort have large windows opening onto a terrace or balcony. They include satellite TV, an electric kettle and a marble bathroom.

The restaurants at the Plaza Beach serve world cuisine, ranging from Italian to Indian to barbecue specialties. There are also pool bars serving refreshing cocktails and light snacks.

Guests can work out with state-of-the-art equipment at the gym. For younger guests, there is also a children’s playground.

The resort is a 10-minute drive from Sharm el-Sheikh Airport. Hotel Name: Hotel Novotel Sharm El-Sheikh
Description:
Located in Sharm El-Sheikh, this hotel is located within Naama Bay. It has a private beach, 5 swimming pools, and offers air-conditioned rooms with satellite TV.

Rooms at the Novotel Sharm El-Sheikh have tiled floors and elegant furnishings. They come equipped with a mini-bar, as well as tea and coffee making facilities. Some rooms feature balconies with panoramic views.

The property has two wings "Beach Wing" located at the side of the beach and "Palm Wing" located on the other side across the road.

The Novotel has 3 restaurants that serve a variety of regional and international cuisine. Al Dente offers Italian fare and views of the Red Sea. The Bedu Bar provides live entertainment.

Guests can enjoy a relaxing massage, or visit the fitness center. The hotel also has a games room with table tennis, and a children’s playground.

Novotel Sharm El-Sheikh is less than 6.2 mi from Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport. Hotel Name: Charmillion Sea Life Resort
Description:
Located on the beach of Nabq Bay, the 4-star Charmillion Sea Life Resort offers bright rooms with a furnished balcony. It has a diving center and its outdoor pool has a bar and is surrounded by cushioned loungers.

The rooms at Charmillion Sea Life Resort come with a satellite TV. Each is fitted with tiled floors and a modern mix of beige colors.

Massages and a variety of beauty treatments are offered at the spa. It also has a gym and a steam room. Guests can snorkel at the beach or play a game of table tennis, and there is a playground for younger guests.

International dishes are served at the main restaurant. There is a Japanese Teppanyaki, while traditional Lebanese specialties are offered at El Dewania. There is also a 24-hour all-inclusive service and a dine-around concept, where guests can eat and drink at bars in sister hotels of Charmillion Group Resorts

Hotel Name: Reef Oasis Blue Bay Resort & Spa
Description:
The elegant ultra all inclusive Reef Oasis Blue Bay is a 5-star resort located in Sharm El Sheikh, 1.2 mi from the famous Naama Bay and 3.1 mi from the airport. The property includes a private beach area, a water park and an outdoor pool. Free WiFi access is available in public areas.

All rooms at the Reef Oasis are air-conditioned and include a private bathroom. The registration will be in the main lobby with the look and sound of luxury fountain, music and aroma thereby. There is a welcome area with welcome drinks served to you with our gracious hospitality upon your arrival.

The Food and Beverage outlets will include the breakfast snacks and light lunches in both Leisure pool bar and beach bar. The fisherman bar will be serving you drinks at the infinity pool until sunset. The main dining room “Bay View” will be available with great varieties and food offering on its Breakfast, Lunch and dinner buffets. The Italian Restaurant will be open via our reservation program. The Gallery area along with the Pub bar will be operating 24 hours with sandwiches and beverage menu.

We will have the Leisure pool with its Jacuzzi area and water slides, Baby Pool and infinity pools with the Jacuzzi area operating for your convenience along with the beach with the three Jacuzzis®.

Room service will be operated 24 hours “on additional charge basis”. The property includes animation and entertainment, a sport zone, a diving center, a gym and a Spa. Reservations are required.

For the convenience of our guests, the hotel provides a free “Tuftuf” every 5 min and golf carts for special service like luggage delivery. | We have an instant answer to most questions | Children of all ages are welcome. | To see correct prices and occupancy info, add the number and ages of children in your group to your search. | Cribs and extra beds aren't available at this property. | Please note that the rate for the ‘Special Offer - Egyptian and Residents Only’ room is exclusive for Egyptians only. Hotel Name: Reef Oasis Beach Aqua Park Resort
Description:
Featuring a landscaped pool area with 13 pools, this resort has air-conditioned rooms with balconies overlooking the Red Sea or the pools. It features a private beach and a tennis court.

Surrounded by the Sinai Mountains, Reef Oasis Beach Resort offers spacious, air-conditioned rooms with a satellite TV. Each room is decorated in neutral colors and has modern furnishing.

Reef Oasis has 6 restaurants serving Italian and grilled dishes, among a wide range of specialties. There are 10 bars, some of which serves drinks during the day, while others offer entertainment in the evening.

Guests can relax on the sun loungers by the pools, or use the fitness center. Younger guests can visit the Nemo’s Kids Club. Reef’s spa offers range of spa facilities, including a hot tub, a sauna, and massage treatments.

Hotel Name: Charmillion Club Resort
Description:
Located along Nabq Bay, the all-inclusive Charmillion Club Resort has a private beach with a coral reef and 3 restaurants. It offers an outdoor pool and large rooms with a balcony.

All modern and air-conditioned rooms at Charmillion Club Resort Sharm El Sheikh come a mini-bar and a satellite TV. Each also offers a spacious bathroom with a shower.

Breakfast is served in Charmillion Club Resort's buffet restaurant. Il Pescatore provides seafood and beachfront dining. There is 24-hour all-inclusive service and a dine-around concept, where guests can eat and drink at bars in Charmillion Group Resorts' sister hotels.

Guests can undergo a massage in the spa or enjoy a sauna or steam bath session. Sporty visitors can play tennis or go diving. Hotel Name: Turquoise Beach Hotel
Description:
Located on El Sharm Maya Bay, most popular for its diving spots, Turquoise Beach Hotel is located on the Red Sea shore. It offers a pristine private beach, an indoor and outdoor pool with a sun-lounger terrace.

All the rooms and apartments overlook the garden, sea or pool. Each accommodations is equipped with a satellite TV, a wardrobe and a telephone. The apartment includes a living room with sofa. Some rooms include a balcony or patio.

The hotel’s main restaurant serves three meals daily which is breakfast, lunch and dinner. A buffet-style breakfast is served daily, while à-la-carte specialties are served in the evening. Room service is 24 hours.

Guests willing to take diving lessons can opt for the professional services offered by the diving center at the hotel. Water sports available on site include snorkeling and wind surfing. Relaxing massage treatments can be arranged upon request.

Old Market in Sharm El Sheikh is located within 1640 feet’ walk from Turquoise Beach Hotel. Hotel Name: Amphoras Blu Ultra-All Inclusive Adults Only
Description:
Nestled along a private beach overlooking the Red Sea, Amphoras Blu Ultra All-Inclusive Hotel is an Adult Only (+16) offering the perfect blend of relaxation and adventure. The hotel lies just 6.8 mi from Sharm El Sheikh International Airport, 2.7 mi from Naama Bay, and 1.6 mi from Downtown.

Guests can indulge in rich international buffets at the Main Restaurant, or savor Mediterranean flavors at Mare Rosso, an à la carte fish restaurant located at Amphoras Blu. They can also explore three exquisite à la carte venues at the sister property Amphoras Beach, located alongside Amphoras Blu: Bella Vista, where Italian charm meets sea breeze; Red Dragon, serving Asian-inspired creations; and Mermaid, offering the freshest seafood.

Refreshing drinks and imported alcoholic beverages are available around the clock at the Welcome Bar, open 24/7, while the Beach Bar serves seaside treats, including late breakfast and ice cream. For poolside relaxation, the Palma Pool Bar offers imported alcoholic beverages and shisha in a laid-back ambiance.

Guests are welcomed with a fruit basket and cookies upon arrival. They can also enjoy a limited number of complimentary laundry pieces and free access to modern fitness facilities, including a padel court, gym, spinning classes, and CrossFit sessions.

With its perfect balance of relaxation, gastronomy, and recreation, Amphoras Blu promises an unforgettable Red Sea escape for guests aged 16 and above. | Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 9.2 for a two-person trip. | Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap | Children over 16 are welcome. | Children 18 and above will be charged as adults at this property. | To see correct prices and occupancy info, add the number and ages of children in your group to your search.

Hotel Name: Traveller Namma bay
Description:
Comfortable Accommodations: Traveler Namma bay in Sharm El Sheikh offers a spacious apartment with a garden, terrace, bar, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available in public areas.

Modern Amenities: The apartment features air-conditioning, a terrace, hot tub, kitchenette, balcony, private bathroom, mini-bar, TV, electric kettle, and oven. Free on-site private parking is provided.

Prime Location: Located less than 0.6 mi from Naama Bay Beach, 1.2 mi from Tonino Lamborghini International Convention Center, and 5 mi from Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport. Nearby attractions include Ghibli Raceway and Sinai Grand Casino.

 Guests can enjoy scuba diving in the surrounding waters.

Hotel Name: Savoy Sharm El Sheikh
Description:
Located directly on the beach and in the center of SOHO Square, this 5-star resort offers lush tropical surroundings and luxurious rooms with satellite TVs. Facilities include 5 swimming pools and water sports activities that include diving and snorkeling. Tennis and squash courts are also available.

The bright rooms of Savoy Sharm El Sheikh Hotel enjoy a modern and stylish interior. All rooms have a private balcony or terrace featuring panoramic views of the landscaped gardens, the pools, or the Red Sea.

Savoy Sharm El Sheikh Hotel’s 6 restaurants serve dishes from all over the world, including Asian, Italian, and Mediterranean cuisine. Guests can enjoy a wide variety of drinks, live music, and water pipes at any of the 5 bars. SOHO Square Sharm El Sheikh provides entertainment for all tastes with a variety of restaurants, cafes and bars.

The Aqua Spa & Wellness Center offers a range of health and beauty treatments, including Ayurvedic massages and body exfoliations. There is also a kids' club, games room with table football, and darts.

Sharm El Sheikh International Airport is 5 mi away. Hotel Name: Dreams Beach Resort - Sharm El Sheikh
Description:
This 5-star resort is located by its own private beach area in Sharm el-Sheikh. It features an outdoor pool with a water slide and bright guest rooms with a balcony overlooking the terrace.

The air-conditioned rooms are fitted with colorful furnishings and bedding. Each has satellite TV and a mini-bar.

Guests can choose among 6 different food and beverage outlets, with the Main Buffet Restaurant and the Italian at the pool, Grill house on the Beach, Mexican & Asian Restaurant. Drinks and cocktails are available from the Pub and Bar. Guest can enjoy at the Bedouin Tent which serve Shisha.

Dreams Beach Resort - Sharm El Sheikh has a tennis court and a hot tub. The playground and the Children’s Paradise club offer entertainment for younger guests.

Staff at the front desk is available 24 hours a day. Free parking is provided on site and Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport is a 15-minute drive away. Hotel Name: Stella Di Mare Beach Hotel & Spa
Description:
This luxurious 5-star resort is located on a private beach at scenic Na'ama Bay’s entrance. The resort offers 3 gourmet restaurants, state-of-the-art dove training and a 600 m2 spa.

Stella Di Mare’s modern, spacious rooms have large windows and plenty of natural light. Each features a private outdoor terrace or balcony, some with sweeping views of the Red Sea. In-room amenities include satellite LCD TV and all-day room service.

Stella Di Mare’s lagoon-style outdoor swimming pool is surrounded by a waterfall and tropical gardens. Guests can snorkel in coral reefs located directly off of the resort’s beach. Evening entertainment is offered nightly.

La Terrazza serves candlelit dinners at its outdoor, sea-facing terrace. Fresh Mediterranean cuisine is available at Stella Di Mare’s Corallo Rosso restaurant. Italian cuisine is on offer at La Scogliera.

The islands of Ras Mohammed National Park are 9.9 mi from the hotel. Stella Di Mare Beach Hotel & Spa is located a 20-minute drive away from Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport. Hotel Name: Grand Rotana Resort & Spa
Description:
Surrounded by large tropical gardens with waterfalls and palm trees, this beach front, 5-star resort on Shark’s Bay offers a private beach, huge lagoon-style pool and a spa. Each room has a private balcony.

Each bright and airy room at the Grand Rotana Resort & Spa is equipped with modern furnishings. They have satellite TV and free tea and coffee facilities. They also feature views of the gardens, the pool or the Red Sea.

Guests can relax in the spa bath and sauna of the Grand Rotana's spa. Tennis courts and a gym equipped with cardio equipment and free weights are also available. The huge outdoor pool is the same size as 3 olympic-size pools.

Grand Rotana’s restaurant, Mezzaluna, offers authentic Italian specialties along with scenic views of the Red Sea. Silk Road offers a combination of Eastern and Western dishes. Exotic cocktails can be enjoyed at the various bars.

Grand Rotana Resort is a 15-minute drive from Sharm El Sheikh airport and Naama Bay. Soho Square is 10 minutes by car. Hotel Name: Movenpick Resort Sharm El Sheikh
Description:
Welcoming guests since 1998 , The Arabesque style resort is directly overlooking the turquoise water of Naama Bay with a wide panoramic view over the whole bay.

With authentic and simply decorated rooms , heated swimming pool , exceptional culinary experience , 5 beaches and a variety of water sports and activities , Mövenpick Resort Sharm El Sheikh Naama Bay is your perfect choice for a relaxing hassle free vacation.

Oriental and Egyptian cuisine is offered at the El Kababgy Restaurant while La Brise serves Italian food. Indian food is served at the Rangoli. Liwa Restaurant serves international dishes from the terrace with Red Sea views.

Sharm Mövenpick guests can enjoy a relaxing massage, or visit the fitness center which includes cardiovascular equipment. There is also a tennis court and a hot tub. Nearby leisure activities include diving, snorkeling and horse riding. Horse lovers find a riding paradise within the resort with breathtaking views over a desert and sea landscape with offers of various trips to the beach and to the desert for beginners and experienced riders.

Mövenpick Sharm El-Sheikh is conveniently located a 10-minute drive from both Sharm El-Sheikh International Airport and the city center. Hotel Name: Royal Savoy Sharm El Sheikh
Description:
Located in the center of Soho Square, the Royal Savoy features free WiFi in all areas, a private beach, 3 swimming pools and a beach bar. Snorkeling and diving facilities are available upon request.

The Royal Savoy offers luxurious rooms, suites and villas fitted with air conditioning and plasma satellite TV. The villas come with a private pool and a garden, Each unit has a marbled bathroom and a balcony or patio overlooking the hotel’s landscaped gardens or sea.

The Savoy's spa has several massage rooms, steam room and sauna, hot tub as well as a rooftop rest area with parasols. It offers treatments using natural herbs, pure essential oils and products from Egypt.

Guests can relax in the Savoy’s exclusive private lounge, which offers a continental breakfast, assorted snacks and canapes throughout the day. A wide variety of dining options are offered at the property's 6 restaurants and 8 bars.

The Royal Savoy is only 3.1 mi from Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport and a free private limousine airport transfer is available on request. Hotel Name: Dreams Vacation Resort - Sharm El Sheikh
Description:
Featuring a quarter mile of private Red Sea beach, this all-inclusive resort has rooms with a balcony. The resort has 5 swimming pools and a spa. Free private parking is available on site.

A minibar and a satellite TV are included in Dreams Vacation Resort - Sharm El Sheikh’s air-conditioned rooms. The bright rooms have a private bathroom with a hairdryer.

Massage treatments are offered at the spa, which has a hot tub and a sauna. Guests can relax on a lounger by the pool or enjoy a game of tennis.

Dreams Vacation Resort has 3 in-house restaurants including a Mexican restaurant and a buffet restaurant with an outdoor terrace. Drinks can be enjoyed in the Sailor Bar in the lobby.

Hotel Name: Falcon Hills Hotel
Description:
Overlooking Sinai Mountains, Falcon Hills Hotel offers value-for-money accommodations with 2 beaches nearby. It features 2 outdoor pools, tennis courts and a spa with massage treatments.

Located in the Ras Umsid Plateau, the hotel provides diving equipment to explore the coral reefs of the Red Sea. Amphora Beach is only 2461 feet away, while Falcon Hills’ private beach is connected by a free shuttle service.

Rooms all open out on to a private balcony and are equipped with a satellite TV. Private bathrooms come with bathtub or a shower, and air conditioning is standard.

Guests can benefit from 24-hour refreshments and a pool bar. Popular Na’ama Bay is also connected with a free shuttle service. Hotel Name: Naama Bay Promenade Beach Resort Managed By Accor
Description:
Located in the heart of the popular Naama Bay, Naama Bay Promenade Beach Resort Managed By Accor offers spacious accommodations overlooking the hotel's tropical gardens, the extensive pool or beach panoramic view. It also features a private beach. Guests can enjoy free WiFi in the public areas of the hotel.

Featuring 520 units, the resort is divided between the beach side and the Mountain "garden" side with spectacular views of the sea, pool and gardens. All of the property's air-conditioned rooms are spacious and fitted with private bathroom with bathtub. Each unit comes with a mini-bar and safe box, while beach side rooms also feature flat-screen TVs.

Naama Bay Promenade Beach Resort Managed By Accor’s well-equipped gym offers guests the chance to keep fit or to relax in the sauna and the steam room. Sun beds around the hotel’s large, outdoor pool offer ample space to bathe in the sun.

Dining options consist of a buffet restaurant along with Japanese and Italian specialty restaurants. Beach BBQ hosts live entertainment, while Piano bar serves drinks all evening. Guests can also enjoy unlimited soft drinks and water along with their meals in the buffet restaurants.

Sharm El Sheikh International Airport is only 6.2 mi away from the property. Hotel Name: Pickalbatros Laguna Vista Aqua Park - 24 HRS All Inclusive
Description:
Located on a private sandy beach in Nabq Bay, Albatros Laguna Vista offers air-conditioned rooms with Led screen TV. It features an outdoor pool, an indoor pool, and a diving Center. Free WIFI is available throughout the property.

The rooms at Pickalbatros Laguna Vista Aqua Park - 24 HRS All Inclusive feature a modern interior with warm colors, Bathrooms offer handheld shower heads, makeup/shaving mirrors and hair dryers. In addition, amenities available on request include irons/ironing boards and wake-up calls. Housekeeping is offered daily. Tiled floors, and floor-to-ceiling windows. All rooms have balconies or terraces with sea or pool views. A safety box and mini-bar are also featured.

Which Way Restaurant serves barbecue specialties and characteristic Egyptian dishes. Guests can enjoy refreshing cocktails at the Concerto Bar which is surrounded by a waterfall.

Albatros Laguna Vista’s entertainment team performs live music and dance shows at the amphitheater. Regular trips can be arranged to the surrounding natural areas of St. Catherine and Ras Mohamed.

Guests can get a relaxing massage at the spa, which also features a well-equipped gym. The hotel also offers  tennis courts, Billiard Room , Mini Golf , and a beach volleyball court.

Hotel Name: JAZ Elite Palace - Adults Friendly 16 Years Plus
Description:
JAZ Elite Palace - Adults Friendly 16 Years Plus is a complex featuring 2 freshwater outdoor pools and rooms with balconies overlooking Sharm El Maya Bay.

All rooms feature a private furnished balcony or terrace with views of the pool, sea side or the garden. Rooms with inter-connecting doors and accessible rooms designed for the guests are available upon request.

International cuisine and night entertainment are provided at the 9 restaurants and bars. Guests can choose between seafood, Italian specialties and meat dishes, and sip an exotic cocktail at the poolside bar.

The spa includes reviving treatments, massage, relaxation programs, sauna, steam and also beauty services at an extra charge. For some outdoor activity, there are 2 tennis courts and water sports facilities for an added charge.

For the all-inclusive formula, guests can enjoy daily tea and coffee making facilities and complimentary bottle of water, replaced daily. Access to private sandy beach with towel center (free towels, sun beds and shades), and free fully-equipped fitness center . All-Inclusive guests can enjoy nonalcoholic beverages and international favorites at the breakfast buffet, lunch and dinner in two main restaurants.There is an outdoor bar with variety of local alcoholic, soft and hot drinks and free live music program for daily entertainment.

Hotel Name: Sanafir Hotel - El Pacha Suites Sharm - Adults Only
Description:
Prime Location: Sanafir Hotel - El Pacha Suites Sharm - Adults Only is located in Sharm El Sheikh city center, offering proximity to Naama Bay Beach just a few steps away. The Tonino Lamborghini International Convention Center is a 7-minute walk, while Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport lies 5.6 mi from the property.

Exceptional Facilities: Guests enjoy spa facilities, a sun terrace, a modern restaurant, a bar, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available in public areas, ensuring connectivity throughout the stay.

Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, tea and coffee makers, and balconies with pool views. Additional amenities include mini-bars, flat-screen TVs, and free streaming services, catering to all comfort needs.

Dining Experience: The restaurant serves British, French, American, Italian, Mediterranean, pizza, Texmex, Australian, local, and international cuisines, offering brunch, lunch, dinner, and cocktails. Breakfast options include continental, American, Ã la carte, vegetarian, vegan, halal, and gluten-free.

Nearby Attractions: Guests can explore Naama Bay Beach, Tonino Lamborghini International Convention Center, and Ras Mohammed National Park, all within 22 mi. Scuba diving opportunities enhance the surrounding area.

Hotel Name: Pickalbatros Golf Beach Resort - All Inclusive
Description:
Set on the Red Sea Coast, this 5-star resort features a private beach, an 18-hole golf course, 6 restaurants serving international cuisine, and 2 pools with water slides and a lazy river. It also features a tennis court.

The rooms at Pickalbatros Golf Beach Resort - All Inclusive have tiled flooring. They include a private balcony and satellite TV. Some rooms have panoramic views of the Red Sea.

At the Sushi Lounge, guests can enjoy sashimi and vegetarian dishes. There is also an American-style bistro and a discotheque for evening entertainment.

Pickalbatros Golf Beach Resort has a health club that provides soothing massages and a gym with cardiovascular equipment. For younger guests, the Pickalbatros Golf Beach Resort - All Inclusive also has a children’s playground. Free Wi-Fi can be accessed in public areas.

Pickalbatros Golf Beach Resort - All Inclusive is less than 3.1 mi from Sharm El Sheikh International Airport.

The hotel is a 10-minute drive from the city center and Soho Square.
